validation_rows.requirement: direct upstream P3-SPEC-COMPILER review decision is approved and current
validation_rows.failure_mode: assurance starts from stale or unapproved compiler authority

validation_rows.requirement: assurance input index binds compiler review decision sha256, subject hash, compiler output refs, schema refs, validator refs, and invalidation inputs
validation_rows.failure_mode: final gate cannot prove which compiler package and validators were reviewed

validation_rows.requirement: read-only QA writes only READ_ONLY_QA_REPORT.md and qa_finding_index.json and mutates no compiled artifact
validation_rows.failure_mode: post-compile QA changes canonical final output or writes unauthorized files

validation_rows.requirement: trace rows contain every required field, use one focused implementation duty, and have one validator check id per row
validation_rows.failure_mode: future implementation cannot be traced to a precise spec clause and validator

validation_rows.requirement: code targets are inside allowed write paths and outside forbidden write paths
validation_rows.failure_mode: future implementation can write outside its authorized area

validation_rows.requirement: test obligation matrix has exactly matching trace_row_id, implementation_duty, validator_check_ids, and acceptance_command for every trace row
validation_rows.failure_mode: implementation duties have no executable proof obligation or mismatched validator checks

validation_rows.requirement: every test obligation has both positive and negative cases
validation_rows.failure_mode: tests can show happy path but cannot prove invalid scope, missing refs, or mutation attempts are rejected

validation_rows.requirement: implementation workpack index references existing trace rows and no orphan code targets
validation_rows.failure_mode: future workpack scope cannot be maintained or reviewed

validation_rows.requirement: implementation workpack template declares required specs, spec locks, trace rows, allowed paths, forbidden paths, validators, tests, commands, skill bindings, review policy, promotion policy, and invalidation policy
validation_rows.failure_mode: future implementation package can run without complete governance envelope

validation_rows.requirement: implementation workpack index generated_at is deterministic or explicitly excluded from reviewed semantic and lock-readiness hashes by an approved rule
validation_rows.failure_mode: same assurance inputs produce different reviewed indexes because wall-clock or machine-local generation metadata changed

validation_rows.requirement: skill binding manifest remains subordinate to specs, validators, locks, review gates, and source authority
validation_rows.failure_mode: skill text can silently override governance or create new authority

validation_rows.requirement: traceability exceptions name affected rows, scope delta, reason, requested workpack, and human gate decision
final assurance report blocks on unresolved findings, invalidated rows, unreviewed exceptions, QA mutation, or lock readiness drift
validation_rows.failure_mode: gate can pass despite broken verification or implementation scope

validation_rows.requirement: candidate scope is limited to P3-SPEC-ASSURANCE candidate files and does not create locks, implementation code, compiler outputs, or prior candidate mutations
validation_rows.failure_mode: spec candidate mutates repository code, locks, compiler outputs, prior approved candidates, root P3 files, or P1/P2 files

minimum_test_obligations: candidate-check for P3-SPEC-ASSURANCE returns PASS with zero findings
candidate-check with P3-SPEC-COMPILER REVIEW_DECISION returns PASS
schema-bound assurance artifact minimum_fields match current schema required fields
assurance artifact envelope fields are declared for every artifact
trace row set requires single-action duties and one validator check id per row
test obligation matrix requires both positive and negative cases
implementation workpack template requires spec locks, trace rows, allowed paths, forbidden paths, validators, tests, commands, and policies
implementation workpack index generated_at is deterministic or explicitly excluded by an approved rule
skill binding manifest is checked for second-authority language
read-only QA boundary rejects final DRD mutation and extra outputs
final assurance report cannot pass with blocking findings or lock creation side effects
scope report actual writes exist and forbidden write violations are empty
